name: 第3章第2話の夜ベランダ背景
prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic environment image for a modern web novel. Emphasize atmosphere, lighting, believable architecture, realistic materials, and a unified live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets. Cinematic late-night apartment living room opening to a balcony after a satisfying Sunday. Show a warm standing lamp, a record player or audio corner, a small dessert plate, the balcony railing, distant city lights, and a calm deep-blue night atmosphere. The space should feel lived-in, modest, comfortable, and emotionally complete. Final delivery will be cropped to 1920x1080. Keep the main focal area centered with safe margins and leave enough side information for widescreen composition. Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, character close-up, deformed architecture, low detail, combat, action pose, readable text, collage, split panel, heavy crowd, obvious threat, party mess, luxurious mansion interior
